title: BoP Coins
description: A coins mod based off my server's members!
body:
Adds 6 tiers of Coins, Gold, Lemon, Shroom, Soof, Netherite, Prismatic, these names are based off my server's members, you make a gold coin with 1 copper and 8 gold, 2 diamonds and 3 copper, after that you use 4 gold to make 1 lemon, and 4 lemon to make one shroom coin, and so on

New update:

Added classes orbs that are used for a private smp, as a crafting recipe for modded stuff, as of now doesn't serve a purpose by itself

Added portal tiers that can be obtained from trading from a portal master villager, you can get the profession from a portal block and trade with him
